_comment: One entry per franchise. 'logo' points to assets/img/teams/<slug>.png — drop a file there with that exact name, run `npm run build`, and it replaces the auto-generated initials crest automatically. See docs/CONTENT-GUIDE.md.
_note: This roster spans every season, so it is NOT the list of teams in any one year. melbourne-thunders played 2024 but not 2025; the seven teams below melbourne-cobras played 2025 but not 2024. A team with no row in the selected year's points table simply shows no rank.
_todo: melbourne-thunders has no logo file yet — it renders a generated initials badge until assets/img/teams/melbourne-thunders.png exists.

teams.name: Melbourne Bulls
teams.blurb: One of MSL Premiers' most consistent line-ups, anchored by explosive top-order batting.

teams.name: Melbourne Pirates
teams.blurb: A balanced squad built around disciplined bowling and sharp fielding.

teams.name: Melbourne Thunders
teams.blurb: League leaders across the regular season, driven by all-round depth.

teams.name: Auscon Melbourne United
teams.blurb: A deep, versatile roster with strength across both batting and bowling departments.

teams.name: Melbourne Tuskers
teams.blurb: Featuring MSL Premiers' leading run-scorer, the Tuskers bring genuine match-winning power.

teams.name: Melbourne Cobras
teams.blurb: A young, ambitious squad looking to climb the MSL Premiers table.
